name: Iced Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the espresso powder in hot water until fully mixed.
2. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature. You can swirl it gently in a small metal bowl to speed up cooling.
3. In a blender, combine the cooled espresso mixture, sweetened condensed milk, and ice cubes.
4. Blend on high for one minute, ensuring no visible chunks of ice remain.
5. Pour into glasses with a spoon and serve with a straw.
Makes 2 tall or 4 short drinks.
